trigger: Coach Yourself Academy waiting list sign-up

emails.subject: You're officially in – Here's what's coming next 👀
emails.body_text:
Thanks for signing up — I'm genuinely excited you're here.
I created Coach Yourself Academy for people like you — driven cyclists who want to go deeper, smarter, and take control of their training. Whether you want to:
Train yourself with more purpose and structure
Coach your child or a small group of clubmates
Or finally launch your own coaching business…

This course is going to give you the knowledge, frameworks, and tools to do exactly that. Over the last decade, I've helped cyclists at every level transform their riding — and now I'm packaging that experience into a self-paced system built around clarity, simplicity, and results.

Here's what's next:
- You'll get early access before public release
- I'll send behind-the-scenes sneak peeks as we build
- There'll be limited launch spots — and you'll get first pick

This first cohort is going to shape the future of the Academy. You're not just on the list — you're part of the founding group.

Let's make something special happen.
Anthony
Roadman Cycling
